prompt: Create a luxurious, photorealistic official character-themed whole cake product shot based on Nozomu. The cake is a tall round celebration cake on an ornate gold-rimmed glass cake stand, photographed in warm soft-focus lighting with sparkling gold candleholders and pastel flowers blurred in the background. The cake should feel like a real premium bakery item, not a flat printed cake. Turn the character into a handcrafted edible 3D doll emerging from the top center of the cake: a delicate anime-style girl with long wavy platinum-blonde hair, pale skin, large blue jewel-like eyes, a grey frilly dress with puff sleeves, black ribbon bows at the collar and sleeves, and a dreamy elegant expression; obscure or avoid detailed facial identity if needed, but keep the doll-like luxury aesthetic. Surround her with translucent ice-crystal sugar shards, large pale blue ribbon shapes, white and pastel flowers, pearl sprinkles, blue sugar gems, and glossy edible beads. The frosting is pearly white with subtle silver-blue marbling and tiny piped pearls, with pastel blue drip accents and ornate cream piping around the top and bottom edges. Add exactly four visible black ribbon bow decorations: one large black bow with a heart-shaped jewel at the front center of the cake, one small black bow on the left side, one small black bow on the right side, and one small bow on the character's bodice. Add exactly two readable text areas: a cream oval plaque on the front-right side reading のぞむ above NOZOMU, and no other prominent lettering. Use a color palette of pearl white, icy blue, champagne gold, soft pink, lavender, and glossy black. Composition: vertical 4:5 close-up product photography, cake centered and filling most of the frame, shallow depth of field, high-end patisserie styling, intricate edible details, sparkling highlights, realistic frosting texture, no watermark, no logo, no extra characters, no flat printed character image.
